title: Stelis damianii
intro: Stelis damianii, also known as Damian's Stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which can help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Stelis damianii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Stelis damianii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is commonly used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne.
